description: Files still permitted to read character state directly without going through resolveCharacter(req). This list only shrinks — adding a new file requires plan approval. Remove a file from this list once fully migrated to services/characterContext.js.

allowlist.services/characterContext.js: canonical resolver — reads these patterns is its job
allowlist.server.js: bootstrap and character-switch endpoints write app.locals.config
allowlist.controllers/charactersController.js: character CRUD writes selectedCharacter — read sites migrated
allowlist.controllers/motionTrackingController.js: pending migration — add to Pillar 2 follow-up
allowlist.controllers/webcamController.js: pending migration — add to Pillar 2 follow-up
allowlist.controllers/partsController.js: pending migration — add to Pillar 2 follow-up
allowlist.routes/aiSettingsRoutes.js: one helper function (getCurrentCharacterInfo) has no req — service-layer boundary
allowlist.routes/api/audioLoopRoutes.js: pending migration — add to Pillar 2 follow-up
allowlist.routes/api/partsApi.js: pending migration — add to Pillar 2 follow-up
allowlist.routes/firstRun.js: pending migration — first-run wizard; low frequency, low risk
allowlist.routes/scenes/api.js: remaining req.query.characterId reads used with Pattern C explicit override
allowlist.routes/setup/calibration.js: three helper functions (loadCharacterParts, saveCharacterParts, getMarkersForPart) have no req — service-layer boundary
allowlist.routes/setup/head-animation.js: pending migration — add to Pillar 2 follow-up
allowlist.routes/setup/jaw-animation.js: pending migration — add to Pillar 2 follow-up
